October 2013 Bolle Transport Dutch haulier operating into collected sealed load from Frankfurt Airport delivery Royal Mail depot Langley Berkshire,
When load arrived Langley illegals were found inside.
Home Secretary imposed Civil Penalty £7,200.
appeal County Court found that illegal entrants entered trailer from supposedly secure 'airside' part Frankfurt Airport area which drivers have access.
Bolle Transport also technology-based system illegals prevention door sensors, real-time tracking messaging systems which better than Home Office-recommended paper-based checks recording system.
judge found that Bolle neither knew suspected that illegals were vehicle agreed that their prevention system better than Home Office recommended system refused appeal, saying that penalty system mandatory illegals found then, whether knew not, penalty.
Court Appeal agreed hear case, saying that appeal "....raised important questions principle about operation system penalties imposed upon carriers......" thought likely that Court Appeal will issue guidelines imposition penalties should managed future.
Secretary State resisting appeal.
appeal being conducted Simon Clarke, barrister Head Road Transport Cartwright King Solicitors, together with Richard Tinkler.
Both recognised experts national International Road Transport both represent other European operators their drivers.

Erlean Richards, passed away Friday, April 2019, Comanche, Texas.

June 1940, united marriage Paul Richards Comanche.
preceded death April 2002.
amazing wife, mother, grandmother great-grandmother, great-great grandmother family relied wisdom advice throughout lifetime.
over twenty years Erlean employed sales clerk Durham's Pharmacy, still found time busy life crochet baby blankets make beautiful quilts.
loved gardening, dominos fishing, famous among family friends delicious pecan pies.
member First Baptist Church Comanche.
survived daughter, Bonnie White Comanche; son, Jackie Paul Richards wife Angela Saba; four grandchildren: Mike Steward wife Iraydi Gustine, Derek Steward wife Gustine, Lance Williams wife Melissa Stephenville, Justin Richards Sipe Springs; thirteen great-grandchildren; great-great granddaughter; numerous nieces nephews.
preceded death daughter, Brenda Burch.

Lorraine Santschi Dove passed away peacefully November 2016 100th year.
Lorraine born Chicago attracted dance early age.
studied acclaimed Merriel Abbott School Dance performing London, Paris, York featured Empire Room, Palmer House, Chicago.
Lorraine relocated Honolulu 1950 urging fellow Merriel Abbott dancer, Flanders, associated with Punahou Dance School.
Lorraine went seven starring roles both song dance Diamond Head Theatre from Oklahoma South Pacific.
Lorraine became board member Honolulu Theatre Youth retired Managing Director.
active many community activities until husband, Harry Dove, moved Waimea, Hawaii.
return Honolulu, maintained cultural interests, community activities, active member Clements Episcopal Church Makiki.
"Who tell myself
someone grateful experiences even challenges I've had-----and opportunity keep learning -----and contribute."
Lorraine survived Mary Dove Bogust (Chris) Billy Dove (Irene), grandchildren lifelong friend, Neva Rego, many other friends.
private burial planned.

fully updated second edition this lively accessible book argues central role media understanding globalization.
Indeed, Jack Lule convincingly shows that globalization could have occurred without media.
From earliest times, humans have used media explore, settle, globalize their world.
day, media made world progressively "smaller" nations cultures come into increasing contact.
Decades Marshall McLuhan prophesied that media technology would transform world into "global village."
Slowly, fitfully, vision being fulfilled.
global village, however, blissful utopia that McLuhan predicted.
Nor, more modern formulation, world flat, with playing fields leveled opportunities all.
Instead, Lule argues, globalization media combining create divided world gated communities ghettos, borders boundaries, suffering surfeit, beauty decay, surveillance violence.
breaking down economic, cultural, political impact media, through rich case studies from around globe, author describes global village Babel invoking biblical town punished vanity seeing citizens scattered, language confounded, destiny shaped strife.
